'''zhofanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:juberous|juberous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juberous|juberous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhofanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhofanithi|zhofanithi]] || [[word:zhofaniji|zhofaniji]] || [[word:zhofanishi|zhofanishi]] || [[word:zhofaniki|zhofaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhofanuthuthu|zhofanuthuthu]] || [[word:zhofanujuju|zhofanujuju]] || [[word:zhofanushushu|zhofanushushu]] || [[word:zhofanukuku|zhofanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhofanuthu|zhofanuthu]] || [[word:zhofanuju|zhofanuju]] || [[word:zhofanushu|zhofanushu]] || [[word:zhofanuku|zhofanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhofanufthuf|zhofanufthuf]] || [[word:zhofanufjuf|zhofanufjuf]] || [[word:zhofanufshuf|zhofanufshuf]] || [[word:zhofanufkuf|zhofanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhofanethe|zhofanethe]] || [[word:zhofaneje|zhofaneje]] || [[word:zhofaneshe|zhofaneshe]] || [[word:zhofaneke|zhofaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhofanothotho|zhofanothotho]] || [[word:zhofanojojo|zhofanojojo]] || [[word:zhofanoshosho|zhofanoshosho]] || [[word:zhofanokoko|zhofanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhofanotho|zhofanotho]] || [[word:zhofanojo|zhofanojo]] || [[word:zhofanosho|zhofanosho]] || [[word:zhofanoko|zhofanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhofanofthof|zhofanofthof]] || [[word:zhofanofjof|zhofanofjof]] || [[word:zhofanofshof|zhofanofshof]] || [[word:zhofanofkof|zhofanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhofanïfthïf|zhofanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfjïf|zhofanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfshïf|zhofanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfkïf|zhofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhofanïfthïfthïf|zhofanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfjïfjïf|zhofanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfshïfshïf|zhofanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfkïfkïf|zhofanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhofanïfthïf|zhofanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfjïf|zhofanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfshïf|zhofanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfkïf|zhofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhofanïfthïf|zhofanïfthïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfjïf|zhofanïfjïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfshïf|zhofanïfshïf]] || [[word:zhofanïfkïf|zhofanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhofanæthæ|zhofanæthæ]] || [[word:zhofanæjæ|zhofanæjæ]] || [[word:zhofanæshæ|zhofanæshæ]] || [[word:zhofanækæ|zhofanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhofanathatha|zhofanathatha]] || [[word:zhofanajaja|zhofanajaja]] || [[word:zhofanashasha|zhofanashasha]] || [[word:zhofanakaka|zhofanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhofanatha|zhofanatha]] || [[word:zhofanaja|zhofanaja]] || [[word:zhofanasha|zhofanasha]] || [[word:zhofanaka|zhofanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhofanafthaf|zhofanafthaf]] || [[word:zhofanafjaf|zhofanafjaf]] || [[word:zhofanafshaf|zhofanafshaf]] || [[word:zhofanafkaf|zhofanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhofanasha|zhofanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhofanshësha|zhofanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhofanrosha|zhofanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhofanmusha|zhofanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhofanyasha|zhofanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhofankshësha|gozhofankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhofankrosha|gozhofankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhofankmusha|gozhofankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhofankyasha|gozhofankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhofafanasha|zhofafanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhofafanshësha|zhofafanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhofafanrosha|zhofafanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhofafanmusha|zhofafanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhofafanyasha|zhofafanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhofafankshësha|gozhofafankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhofafankrosha|gozhofafankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhofafankmusha|gozhofafankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhofafankyasha|gozhofafankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhefænasha|zhefænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhefænshësha|zhefænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhefænrosha|zhefænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhefænmusha|zhefænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhefænyasha|zhefænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhefænkshësha|gozhefænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhefænkrosha|gozhefænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhefænkmusha|gozhefænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhefænkyasha|gozhefænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhofanasha|zhofanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhofanshësha|zhofanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhofanrosha|zhofanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhofanmusha|zhofanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhofanyasha|zhofanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhofankshësha|gozhofankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhofankrosha|gozhofankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhofankmusha|gozhofankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhofankyasha|gozhofankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
